questions.text: The SI unit of length is:
questions.explanation: Meter (m) is the SI unit of length. It's one of the seven base SI units.

questions.text: The number of significant figures in 0.00340 is:
questions.explanation: Leading zeros are not significant. The significant figures are 3, 4, and 0 (trailing zero after decimal is significant).

questions.text: Dimensional analysis can be used to derive the exact numerical constants in formulas.
questions.explanation: Dimensional analysis can check consistency and derive relationships, but cannot determine dimensionless numerical constants.

questions.text: The dimensional formula of force is ________.
